title: OrienteerOutput
description: Output from an orienteer agent: a comprehension model of the change with clear/unclear alignment regions

model.description: Prose description of how the change works: block/sequence/entity relationships with file:line references. Bounded regardless of change size.

clear_alignment.description: Regions where the change plainly serves the charge

region.description: Short name for this region of the change

line.description: Primary line number for this region

rationale.description: Why this region clearly serves the charge

unclear_alignment.description: Regions where it is not evident the change serves the charge

region.description: Short name for this region of the change

line.description: Primary line number for this region

rationale.description: Why alignment to the charge is unclear
